Disclaimer

Educational Use Only. This application contains questions adapted from Neonatology Review: Q&A, 3rd Edition by Brodsky & Martin (2016). This tool is intended solely as a study companion for individuals who have already purchased the book, for personal study and board preparation.

No guarantee of accuracy. While efforts have been made to ensure correctness, errors may exist. Always verify information against primary sources and current clinical guidelines.

Not for clinical use. Information in this application should never be used as the basis for clinical decision-making.
